synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-1828 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 python3.12 security update
description:
[3.12.12-3.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.12.12-3]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-13836
Resolves: RHEL-140978

[3.12.12-2]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-12084
Resolves: RHEL-135387
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-1828

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1828.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
python-unversioned-command-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
python3-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
python3-debug-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
python3-devel-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
python3-idle-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
python3-libs-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
python3-test-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
python3-tkinter-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
python-unversioned-command-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
python3-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
python3-debug-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
python3-devel-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
python3-idle-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
python3-libs-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
python3-test-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
python3-tkinter-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/python3.12-3.12.12-3.0.1.el10_1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-12084
CVE-2025-13836




Description of changes:

[3.12.12-3.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.12.12-3]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-13836
Resolves: RHEL-140978

[3.12.12-2]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-12084
